title: Mims et al PERT Manuscript RT-qPCR Raw Data
author: Mims, Dorothy K
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset contains all raw data (raw fluorescence values measured at each qPCR cycle for each sample) for the manuscript titled "An Optimized Product-Enhanced Reverse Transcriptase Assay for Sensitive and Quantitative Detection of HIV Viral Load and Phenotypic Drug Resistance" from Mims et al.
steps_raw: This dataset contains all raw data (raw fluorescence values measured at each qPCR cycle for each sample) for the manuscript titled "An Optimized Product-Enhanced Reverse Transcriptase Assay for Sensitive and Quantitative Detection of HIV Viral Load and Phenotypic Drug Resistance" from Mims et al.
